title: The Awakening
overview: Hime, the immortal princess, revives Hiro, a young man killed in a mysterious accident, binding him to her service in a world of supernatural threats.

title: Princess Resurrection
overview: Hiro struggles to adapt to his new role as Hime's servant, while they face their first supernatural enemy targeting the princess.

title: Princess Destruction
overview: On his first day of school, Hiro encounters supernatural occurrences and learns more about his half-immortal state. An invisible man infiltrates the mansion, posing new threats.

title: The Dollmaker
overview: A twisted dollmaker creates lifelike puppets from human victims, forcing Hime and Hiro to confront their humanity.

title: The Vampires Feast
overview: A vampire noble hosts a deadly banquet, testing Hime's immortality and Hiro's loyalty.

title: The Werewolf's Howl
overview: A lycanthrope terrorizes a village, forcing Hime to confront her own monstrous nature.

title: The Witch's Curse
overview: A witch curses Hiro, forcing Hime to choose between saving him or preserving her power.

title: The Royal Bloodline
overview: Hime's past resurfaces as a rival claimant to her throne challenges her immortality.

title: The Phantom Castle
overview: Hime and Hiro explore a castle that appears only at midnight, filled with trapped souls.

title: The Silent Village
overview: A village under a silencing curse forces Hime and Hiro to communicate without words.

title: Princess Cat-Tongue
overview: Hiro finds Hiroko, a cat, by the road and takes her in. Hiroko, actually a cat-person, grows attached to Hiro. She turns out to be an unskilled assassin controlled by the bell on her collar. Shocked by her own behavior, she disappears.

title: Princess Attrition
overview: Pharaoh, given the promise of eternal life upon Hime's death, sends his army of mummies to attack Hime. Hime having taken drowsy cold medicine (before knowing about the pending attack) entrusts her life with Hiro.

title: Princess Sacrifice
overview: During a lunar eclipse, Hime and Hiro were pulled into the memory of Akasabi village and had to deal with a serial killer.

title: Princess Dead Run
overview: Riza has been racing with a ghost knight on Sasanagi Pass. One night, he lost his head and went berserk. Hiro, while helping to search for the knight's head, got kidnapped and turned into Zeppeli's "knight". Hime has to save him.

title: Princess Visitation
overview: Hiro's acquaintances find out that he's staying with 3 beautiful women. They confront him and ask Hime if they could be her servants. Hime agrees on condition that they go through an obstacle course in the house. A shape-shifter taking Hiro's form also joins the race to reach Hime first.

title: Princess Succession
overview: Riza, frustrated with training, heads to Hime's lake resort and meets Aron, a were-shark, who was good friends with Lobo Wildman (Riza's brother). Aron turns out to be an assassin of one of the Royalty sent to kill Hime. After being defeated by Riza, she asks Riza to avenge Lobo for her as well.

title: Princess Maturity
overview: A witch from the black forest goes after Hime's and Sherwood's spirit to get eternal youth.

title: Princess Hunter
overview: A raccoon dog became a vampire hunter in order to feed his family, but mistakenly attacks Hime believing her to be a vampire.

title: Princess Ocean
overview: Hime, Hiro and Riza are trapped in a haunted ship and must find and rescue a mysterious mermaid in order to escape. Hime's older brother Emil is introduced.

title: Princess Connection
overview: Hiro is kidnapped by a vampire named Duke Dracul. Riza and Reiri must enter the village of vampires to save him.

title: Princess Banishment
overview: Hiro and his friend Buchi visits Reiri after she doesn't come out to school. However, when they get there, Dracul Duke tries to banish Reiri by sending in low-class vampires. Hime's team comes to help.

title: Princess Carnage
overview: Hime is attacked by three werewolves at night and she and her team must take them down. Riza fights for her family's pride while Hiro is reminded again that he is a warrior protecting Hime's life.

title: Princess Zombie
overview: Hime's team looks for the royalty who sent the werewolves and Dracul Duke. They end up in a town filled with zombies and must get themselves out.

title: Princess Duel
overview: Hime is accused of using zombies by the committee and stands before the judge. She and her brother Severin must battle in order to be freed.

title: Princess Delinquent
overview: Flandre goes on a rampage and seems to attack anyone that approaches her, including Hime. Guessing that Flandre is self-destructing, the group in vain tries to stop her.

title: Sleeping Princess
overview: Hime, Hiro, Riza and Reiri are trapped in a nightmare world. They struggle to find a way out of the dream as they are constantly attacked by imaginary enemies.
